untranslatable_reason: Signal requires advance/decline line (market breadth indicator) and percentage of advancing stocks participating in rally, which are not available in the allowed indicator list. These are market-structure indicators not present in standard price/volume/oscillator sets. Additionally, the multi-step condition logic (prior decline >2%, recovery rally initiated, volume below 20-day average, A/D line retracement failure >5%, breadth participation <40%) requires market-structure data beyond price/volume/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Translated only the portion that can be expressed with available indicators: volume below 20-day SMA and vol_ratio_20 below 1.0 as proxies for weak volume participation. The core breadth and advance/decline line conditions cannot be properly represented without market internals indicators. This rule is best implemented with dedicated market breadth data sources.
